archived.description: Indicates that the doctor has soft-deleted this template, and will not use it for future appointments
archived.title: Archived

workflow_key.description: Identifier for this template. If it's a workflow form, it will be one of `"hp_cc_history_present_illness"`, `"hp_med_fam_social_history"`, `"hp_review_of_systems"`, `"hp_physical_exam"`, `"hp_assessment"`, `"hp_plan"`, `"hp_meds_allergies"`, `"soap_subjective"`, `"soap_objective"`, `"soap_assessment"`, `"soap_plan"`, `"onpatient_additional_info"`, or `"onpatient_reasons_for_visit"`. Otherwise, it will be `"custom_{id}".`
workflow_key.title: Workflow Key

is_persistent.description: If this is true, this report will be the same across all notes
is_persistent.title: Is persistent

archived.description: Indicates that the field has been soft-deleted by the doctor
archived.title: Archived

required.description: Indicates that a note should not be locked unless a value is provided for this field
required.title: Required

on_complete_note.description: Order of the template on complete notes
on_complete_note.title: On complete note

on_ipad.description: Order of the template on iPad
on_ipad.title: On ipad
